## 🚀 Pull Request Checklist (Mandatory)

Thank you for contributing to the Nubenetes ecosystem! Before submitting this PR, you must confirm that you have read and followed the `GEMINI.md` mandates. **The AI PR Guardian will automatically review this PR** against these standards.

**Please check all applicable boxes:**

- [ ] **High-Density Technical Description**: I confirm that the link description provides architectural value, key features, and technical significance (No generic clickbait).
- [ ] **No Emojis in Titles**: I confirm that I have not used any emojis in the H2, H3, or H4 headers (they break MkDocs rendering).
- [ ] **URL Normalization**: I have removed any UTM parameters or social media trackers from the URLs.
- [ ] **Active Project**: I confirm that if this is a GitHub repository, it has had commits within the last 4 years.
- [ ] **Valid Markdown**: I have run or verified that the markdown is valid and does not break the HTML (`<center>` tags, etc.).

### 📝 Description of Changes
*(Briefly explain what this PR adds or fixes)*

### 🛡️ Nubenetes PR Guardian
*(Do not edit this section. The AI PR Guardian will automatically post its review below once the PR is opened.)*
